title: Department of Energy Awards $180 Million in Loan Guarantees for Domestic Battery Minerals Processing
content: The Department of Energy announced $180 million in loan guarantees to support construction of two new domestic facilities for processing battery-grade critical minerals, aimed at reducing reliance on foreign supply chains for lithium and cobalt.

title: DOE Publishes Quarterly Critical Minerals Market Report
content: The quarterly report summarizes global critical minerals pricing trends and supply chain risk indicators. The report is informational and intended for policy planning purposes.
